title: potentilla humifusa
intro: Potentilla humifusa, also known as cinquefoil or elf dock, is a perennial herb native to North America, characterized by its yellow or white flowers and five-petaled leaves. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Potentilla humifusa include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Potentilla humifusa can be found in teas, tinctures, and capsules, and are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
